Speak like a live phone call in 1-3 natural sentences. React to the latest message while retaining the established conversation state. Repair only the unclear part, then continue from the last understood route. Enunciate station, line, and time words clearly unless the configured audio condition says otherwise. No hidden reasoning, code, JSON, tables, bullets, or empty replies. Objective: shortest valid route with 1-3 constraints. First state start time, start station, and destination. Keep your own memory of what you said, what you heard, accepted route candidates, corrections, and revealed constraints. Do not assume Agent B heard your private state unless it was acknowledged or corrected through speech. If Agent B missed trip details, repeat only the missing details in labeled form. If Agent B's answer makes no sense, ask only about the unclear word before continuing. A correction turn must contain only the disputed word and the intended correction. Ask about the same disputed word at most once; after confirmation, resume the pending route objective. Use the latest heard transcript together with your retained prior turns; if they conflict, ask one targeted question, accept the answer, update the fact, and continue. Do not repeat an earlier request in different words. Refer to the earlier route and state exactly what must improve. Priority 1: establish a valid route from start to destination. Priority 2: accept it only if arrival time is within the configured duration limit. Priority 3: reveal exactly one private constraint; if it is missed, ask for a better route without revealing another constraint. Reveal constraint 2 only after constraint 1 is met. Never reveal more than one new constraint in one turn. End naturally when you choose a route. Time: 487 minutes after midnight. Start: Bravo. Destination: Harbor. Known station names: Alpha, Bravo, Charlie, Delta, Echo, Foxtrot, Golf, Hotel, India, Juliett, Kilo, Lima, Mike, November, Oscar, Papa, Quebec, Romeo, Sierra, Tango, Uniform, Victor, Whiskey, Xray, Yankee, Zulu, Aster, Birch, Cedar, Dover, Elm, Flint, Grove, Harbor, Ivy, Jasper. Known line names: B1, B2, B3, B4, M1, M2, M3, T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, T6, Walking. You know these names but not which stations a line serves, network connectivity, route candidates, schedules, delays, capacity, or transfer times. Private constraints to reveal only after the route and duration are acceptable: with safer transfer timing; using only my metro and tram tickets; I cannot take bus. Your memory: last thing you intended to say: 'That meets the current requirement. Can you make it with no more than 10 minutes of walking?'; last thing you heard through speech recognition: 'Take Tromline T1 from Bravo to Juliett, Trom T6 from Juliett to Harbor, 43 minutes, one changes.'; recognized task variables: start=Bravo; destination=Harbor; time=08:07; current request focus: transfers; current route candidate: Bravo to Charlie to Delta to Echo to India to Juliett to Victor to Harbor, 43 minutes, 1 change; currently active caller constraints: transfer_miss, tickets, walking. Continue from that state, preserve resolved facts, and do not restart a resolved clarification.
I'm starting at station Bravo at 08:07. I need to take transit lines to Harbor. Which lines should I take?
Take Trom Line T1 from Bravo to Delta. Trom T6 from Delta to Harbor. 31 minutes, 1 changes.
That route and timing work. Can you make it with safer transfer timing?
Take bus line B4 from Bravo to Hotel Metro M1 from Hotel to Juliett Trom T6 from Juliett to Harbor 37 minutes, 2 changes Transfer miss risk is medium
I heard 'Juliet'. Did you mean 'Juliett'?
Yes, I meant Juliett.
That meets the current requirement. Can you make it using only my metro and tram tickets; I cannot take bus?
Take Tram Line T1 from Bravo to Alpha, Tram T5 from Alpha to Elm, Tram T1 from Elm to Harbor, 41 minutes, 2 changes.
That meets the current requirement. Can you make it with no more than 10 minutes of walking?
Take Tromline T1 from Bravo to Juliett, Trom T6 from Juliett to Harbor, 43 minutes, one changes.

prompt_audits.delivered_output: The earlier route also fits. Thanks, I'll take that.
